reviews.review_description: This game is good but i think nobody is playing on the oculus go im still playing on it but getting bored
Why should not work my rollor coaster only file is cropt showing any body explain pls what I do support me 9987489535
Elhajemi
:p some really good things here.
Bought full version and it's been "syncing" ever since.
It doesn't work on my phone. It appears that the phone just couldn't install the app. (Galaxy S9+)
The title screams "epic" for a reason.
I love this game even it only comes with two free rides both of them are really fun.
This game s-o cool

Awesome game
Do wish there were more free rollercoaster available but other than that I am very happy
Afterwards I bought the other trains do not work with my glasses

developer_response.body: Hi! How are you doing? Did you try to restart the device and open the app again? Please, reopen the game with internet connection =) If after that the problem is still not solved, please, contact us on our facebook page: fb.me/b4t.games

reviews.review_description: Hi, I just installed this on my new Oculus go headset and before I even get to experience it it says update required and it says to leave the power on and connected to Wi-Fi which I have but it doesn’t seem to be doing anything and it’s been over an hour and a half now. I keep clicking on OK and sometimes I don’t even do that but every time I go to the app it still says the same thing update in progress! Is something wrong here or is this first update really taking that long? Do I have to uninstall and reinstall ??￼

I can’t believe how fun this is!
Only question is, how do I activate the other tracks? I purchased them but it won’t let me play them.
Tried to start the app just stuck on load for 10 min ended up deleting it.

developer_response.body: Hey there, sorry about that! Can you please tell us if you're using an Oculus Go or a Samsung GearVR? Feel free to chat with us at http://fb.me/b4t.games.

reviews.review_description: Just gets stuck on loading screen

developer_response.body: Please, try to update your Oculus apps and than reinstall the app. If it still doesn't work, please, contact us on fb.me/b4tgames Thank you!

reviews.review_description: Amazing!

My wife and I really are really having fun with this 360 VR roller coaster ride. The visual quality is good which makes the experience nice. They had a sale going on for all the coasters  and took the plunge and bought the package and no regrets. Would love to see them do a Christmas one with all the color...! Christmas lights and so on. Please no clear lights if you do lol!
I first got this game on Christmas day, 2018. I have played  and will play everyday. I don't mind that  there are only 2 free coasters because they are fun!
I love it

reviews.review_title: Stuck on update message for hours
reviews.review_description: I would love to play this but it will not load.

developer_response.body:
Hey there, can you please open a ticket with Oculus for this?
https://tickets.oculusvr.com/hc/en-us/requests/new?ticket_form_id=360000091492

Probably if you close the Oculus/GearVR app after a while and then open it again our game will be installed! But please open a ticket arguing this with Oculus so they can put some effort in solve this issue for good.

Thank you.
